# function: decrypt

Decrypts data encrypted with eyaml using PKCS7. The data must be wrapped in the `ENC[PKCS7,...]` envelope. This is equivalent to the `eyaml decrypt` command.

~> The `private_key` parameter value will be stored in plaintext in the Terraform state. Use Terraform's built-in `sensitive` function or `sensitive` output attribute to prevent the value from being displayed.

## Example Usage

```terraform
output "decrypted" {
  value     = provider::eyaml::decrypt(var.private_key, var.public_key, var.encrypted_data)
  sensitive = true
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
decrypt(private_key string, public_key string, data string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `private_key` (String) PEM-encoded RSA private key used for decryption.
1. `public_key` (String) PEM-encoded certificate (public key) used for decryption.
1. `data` (String) Encrypted data in `ENC[PKCS7,...]` format.
